_description: Selection rules for the Overview tab (Главное сейчас). Defines what qualifies for each cluster card and card type.

card_types.active_issue: Confirmed, current abnormality requiring action or active clinical follow-up.
card_types.monitor: Persistent abnormality, stable — watch for change but no immediate action needed.
card_types.improving: Was abnormal, now trending toward normal — document progress.
card_types.background_risk: Genetic marker or historical finding with no current clinical significance.
card_types.pending_check: Test result overdue or not yet obtained — gap in monitoring.

status_pills.t-urgent: Actively worsening or newly detected — needs action soon.
status_pills.t-active: Stable but flagged as active issue — keep visible.

must_include: Any parameter with status=critical or status=strong in CHARTS (latest value)
Any cluster where ≥2 related abnormalities are grouped
Any infection marker confirmed by culture or PCR in last 12 months
may_include: Moderate abnormalities (status=moderate) if clinically linked to active cluster
Genetic markers only as ov-note background_risk — never as ov-abn-row
exclude: Normalized values (previously abnormal, now within range for ≥2 measurements)
Duplicate representation of same finding across clusters

clusters.cl-amber: Moderate concern — metabolic or lipid issue
